description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker with a predominantly white upper and striking floral patterns in red, green, and black adorning the midsole, heel, and parts of the outsole. The shoe features black laces in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the tongue and heel tab are accented with the same floral motif. The upper appears to be made of synthetic leather or coated textile, with perforations near the toe box for breathability. The midsole is thick and sculpted, providing ample cushioning and support, while the outsole wraps up around the toe and heel, suggesting enhanced durability and grip. The overall design is bold and fashionable, suitable for urban environments and streetwear culture.
description: A white high-top sneaker with bold red and green floral patterns on the midsole and heel, featuring black laces and a sculpted, cushioned sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white upper, black laces, and prominent floral patterns on the midsole and heel.
description_view_1: Front-angled view highlighting the toe box, black laces, and floral detailing on the outsole and tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the sculpted midsole, white upper, and floral accents wrapping around the heel and sole.
description_view_3: Rear-angled view focusing on the heel, floral heel tab, and the layered construction of the upper and sole.
